query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "mcompassrag: topic metadata as a semantic compass for paragraph-level " linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (b) and (e) by providing an empirical baseline and canonical study for the user's domain: it investigates Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) on a specific, high-stakes text corpus (Quranic studies) using the same core mechanism (RAG) and evaluation metrics (faithfulness, relevance) that the user's question implies for extending "MCompassRAG" in linguistics.
